utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each item is fully detailed: the 'property' section specifies type, location, price, features, taxes, and fees; the 'financing' section explains the method and status; the 'legal_services' section provides provider, cost, currency, and features; the 'moving_services' section includes provider, cost, currency, and included features; the 'setup_services' section lists provider, cost, currency, and included features; and the 'total_budget' section gives a full cost breakdown with totals. All required details are present and appropriately specified.
